loginBenefits: Secure access to your client area

login.title: Sign in to your CYNA area
login.twoFactorRequired: Enter your security code to finish signing in.
login.twoFactorEmailSent: A 6-digit security code has just been sent to your inbox.

register.title: Create your CYNA account
register.copy: Access our solutions and manage your subscriptions.
register.cardCopy: Fill in your details to prepare your access.
register.bothNamesRequired: Please enter your first and last name.
register.passwordHelp: Minimum 12 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, digits and special characters.
register.info: A confirmation email has been sent. Check your inbox to activate your account.

verifyEmail.copyPending: We're validating your address, please hold on.
verifyEmail.copySuccess: Your email address is confirmed. You can sign in.
verifyEmail.copyError: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Email sent again. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendError: Could not resend the email right now.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.copy: Enter your address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.cardCopy: Provide your address to receive the link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account is linked to that address, an email has just been sent.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.copy: The link you received redirected you here. Set your new password.
resetPassword.cardCopy: Enter and confirm your new password.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.tokenMissing: Invalid link. Please request a new reset.
resetPassword.weakPassword: Password too weak: at least {{n}} characters with uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character.
resetPassword.helper: At least {{n}} characters with uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character.
